content.rendered:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space height=”50px” el_class=”height30″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”flexrow”][vc_column width=”1/4″ el_class=”flextwo gt-custom-sidebar-column”][vc_widget_sidebar sidebar_id=”honeymoon-package-international-sidebar”][/vc_column][vc_column width=”3/4″ el_class=”second-div-text flexone”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

If you’re looking for the perfect honeymoon destination, there’s no better place than Paris. Maybe it’s the beautiful buildings, medieval architecture, or suave French culture that evokes these emotions. Paris is the best place to start your journey of love & togetherness with your loved one. At ATW Travels, we have curated some of the best Paris honeymoon packages for you to explore and make your pick.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”When to Pick the Best Paris Packages for Couples?” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Whether it is the bright sunny days or autumn winds, Paris is charming all through the year. The city is cheerful and pleasant during spring while summers are warmer, with temperatures averaging 20 degrees. Paris looks equally dreamy during autumn, with colourful leaves strewn across cobbled pathways and people wearing shades of grey and black in sync with the season. Winter is considered off-season but still has its share of tourists looking to take advantage of budget Paris honeymoon packages.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_single_image image=”26233″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”How to Reach Paris?” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Paris is one of the busiest airports in Europe, with several flights flying in and out from across the world. Charles de Gaulle International Airport is a major airport in Paris, with two other smaller airports servicing the city viz. Orly International Airport and Beauvais Airport.

Traveling by sea is a fantastic experience for those traveling from the United Kingdom. Paris is well connected to many cities within France with five international train stations. Buses also ply internationally, connecting Paris with neighbouring countries – you can board one at the Gare Routiere Internationale du Paris-Gallieni.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”How to Travel Within Paris” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Public transport is excellent in Paris, with the Metro taking you anywhere within Paris and sometimes slightly beyond. All you need is a map to travel from one destination to another. Car hires and rentals are also available, but they are expensive.

Remember to ask your travel advisor at ATW Travels about Paris Passlib – the city’s official pass that offers access to some of the major museums and monuments in the city. These passes are valid for one year from the date of activation. You can also cancel or change your visit until 48 hours before it is due.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Don’t Miss These Attractions in Your Romantic Paris Honeymoon Tour Package” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”The Eiffel Towers” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

The monument has long been considered a symbol of love. The Eiffel Tower is a mesmerizing architectural delight that towers the skyscape and is vividly visible from afar. Ideally, you must visit the Eiffel by night when the tower lights up automatically as it gets dark. The tower also has a 5-minute light show every hour after nightfall until 1am. The scene looks breathtaking – almost as if twinkling stars are falling on earth. Call us if you’d like to surprise your loved one with a gift at the Eiffel Tower.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”The Louvre” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

The world’s largest museum is a paradise for art and history enthusiasts. Even if you aren’t the artsy type, the grand architecture is sure to impress. The Louvre is home to some of the world’s most famous artworks, including Monalisa by Leonardo Da Vinci, The Raft of the Medusa by Théodore Gericault, and the Venus de Milo.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Temple of Love” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

This famous island temple is an architectural marvel of the neoclassical age. It is believed that kissing your beloved in this temple strengthens your love and the relationship. Make sure a visit to the Temple de l’Amour is included in your romantic Paris honeymoon tour package.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_single_image image=”26235″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Notre Dame Cathedral” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

It is one of the most beautiful cathedrals in the world and the finest example of Gothic architecture. The stunning sculptures, paintings, and stained-glass structures are worth your visit.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Luxembourg Garden” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

The Luxembourg Garden is the largest and the most famous garden in Paris. It was witness to the romance between Napolean Bonaparte and Josephine. The statues, fountains, and flower beds create the perfect setting for romance. No wonder it is included in most Paris honeymoon packages.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Disneyland” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Visit Disneyland Paris to make your honeymoon even more magical. Slip into the beautiful world of fantasy where cartoon characters come alive and enjoy some super fun rides.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_single_image image=”26238″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Moulin Rouge” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

If you fancy watching a cabaret, we recommend visiting the Moulin Rouge. This is where the Can-Can dance was born during the Belle Epoque period. Shows are held every night at 9 pm and 11 pm – you could book a regular ticket or a VIP package and even opt for a show with a full meal.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Wine Tours” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

If your idea of a romantic escapade includes sipping on some of the best French wines with your loved one, visit one of the many vineyards in and around Paris.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner full_width=”stretch_row_content_no_spaces” css=”.vc_custom_1645675083319{margin-bottom: 20px !important;padding-top: 40px !important;padding-bottom: 40px !important;background-color: #1a2b48 !important;}” el_id=”mobileshoecontact” el_class=”show-mobile”][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1646220075163{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1644654313324{border-left-width: 1px !important;border-left-color: #ffffff !important;border-left-style: solid !important;}”][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1653551888123{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

[/vc_column_text]

[/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Where to Go Shopping in Paris?” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Paris is a shopper’s delight. If you are brand conscious and aware of the ever-changing fashion scenario, there’s no better than Paris. Some of the world’s famous brand names are nestled on the long stretch of Champs Elysee Street – the most premium shopping destination in Paris. Apart from the fancy flagship stores, Paris also has some flea markets where you can hoard your shopping baskets.

When in Paris, do not miss picking these favorite items:

  • Perfumed Candles.
  • Soaps.
  • French Perfumes.
  • Art & Design Books.
  • French Chocolates, especially the Lindt Store.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Where to Stay in Paris?” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Paris is home to some of the most luxurious properties. There are plenty of bed & breakfast places as well. Some high-end luxury accommodations include

  • Shangri La Hotel
  • Hotel Plaza Athenee
  • Four Seasons Hotel George V Paris

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_single_image image=”26237″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

When in Paris, you must try some of its famous local delicacies. Here’s a list of food you must not miss:

  • Baguettes- the traditional long loaf of bread
  • Croissants- no other place in the world makes perfect croissants like France
  • Macarons- the flavors and colors of macarons you find in Paris are a foodie delight
  • Eclairs
  • Duck Confit- a classic French dish marinated in special herbs and spices and slow-cooked until tender.
  • French Cheese
  • Chocolates
  • Escargot

Discover a whole new dimension to your romantic escapade with curated Paris honeymoon packages from ATW Travels. We offer all-inclusive, completely customized honeymoon packages so that you have the most memorable trip of your life.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What and Where to Eat in Paris?” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

The monument has long been considered a symbol of love. The Eiffel Tower is a mesmerizing architectural delight that towers the skyscape and is vividly visible from afar. Ideally, you must visit the Eiffel by night when the tower lights up automatically as it gets dark. The tower also has a 5-minute light show every hour after nightfall until 1am. The scene looks breathtaking – almost as if twinkling stars are falling on earth. Call us if you’d like to surprise your loved one with a gift at the Eiffel Tower. Follow our Instagram profile to know about the latest offers and discounts.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]
